olist_orders_dataset.description: Main orders table. One row per order.

olist_order_items_dataset.description: Items within each order. One row per item in an order.

olist_order_payments_dataset.description: Payment details per order. Multiple payment types possible per order.

olist_order_reviews_dataset.description: Customer reviews for orders. Contains review score and comments.

olist_customers_dataset.description: Customer information including location by state and city.

olist_products_dataset.description: Product details including category, dimensions and weight.

olist_geolocation_dataset.description: ZIP code to latitude/longitude mapping for Brazil.

product_category_name_translation.description: Translates Portuguese product category names to English.
